lead: The scores cited here are this manual's own role-comparison and dossier verdicts — the source of truth for the site's ratings. The raw ship stats behind those verdicts are verified against the references below.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layouts, module variants and engineering blueprint data behind the engineered-state ceiling.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner used to verify fully-engineered fits per role.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Outfitting planner cross-check for hardpoint, distributor and module figures.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Ship database — comparative hull stats and hardpoint loadouts behind the suitability rankings.
